why.title: لماذا وُجد SectorCalc
why.body: معظم الخسائر التشغيلية لا تظهر على الفاتورة. تختبئ في التسعير والهدر وزمن الإعداد وانخفاض الكفاءة وضعف انضباط العروض، وتآكل الهوامش بهدوء لسنوات.

what.title: ما هو SectorCalc
what.body: مجموعة مركزة من الحاسبات القطاعية وتقارير القرار تحوّل المدخلات التشغيلية الخام إلى أرقام واضحة قابلة للدفاع — ليست جدولاً إضافياً ولا ERP ثقيلاً.

problem.title: المشكلة التي نحلها

how.title: كيف يعمل نظامنا
how.body: تقدّم المدخلات التي تعرفها؛ يحدد النظام ما هو مطلوب ويشغّل حسابات حتمية خاضعة للحوكمة ويتحقق من كل نتيجة مقابل الثوابت والمعايير قبل عرضها.

different.title: ما يميزنا

who.title: لمن صُمم

hero.headline: Stop the Numbers from Discovering Your Losses
hero.subtitle: Most businesses track revenue. Few digitize operational losses. SectorCalc shows you what you're losing before you even know which calculation to make.
hero.micro: No credit card · No Excel · Results in 60 seconds

pain.ticker: While you're reading this page, operational losses continue to accumulate in manufacturing plants across Europe due to miscalculated scrap rates.
pain.label: Where's the Problem?

cards.label: Scrap & Waste
cards.title: Most manufacturers assume 8%, actual is 14%.
cards.body: This 6-point difference creates an annual gap of €40,000–80,000 in a mid-sized plant. And it doesn't show up on the P&L.

cards.label: Machine Efficiency
cards.title: OEE looks like 70%. The real cost impact is uncalculated.
cards.body: Optimization decisions cannot be made without converting downtime, speed loss, and quality rejects into €.

cards.label: Pricing Error
cards.title: Few calculate machine hour costs correctly when quoting.
cards.body: Machine hours not calculated according to VDI 2067, ASHRAE, and ISO standards → margins are eaten on every quote.

cards.label: Energy Cost
cards.title: Energy bills are paid, specific consumption is ignored.
cards.body: Without knowing the energy cost per product and per process step, sustainability claims remain mere intentions.

calc.label: Calculate Now
calc.subhead: 3 inputs. 60 seconds. See your annual scrap cost and recovery potential instantly.
calc.aiTextAbove: Your scrap rate of {rate}% is above the manufacturing average of 6–8%. This deviation alone indicates a monthly operational loss of ≈{monthlyLoss}.
calc.aiTextBelow: Your scrap rate of {rate}% is within the manufacturing average of 6–8%.
calc.aiBlur: To reduce the scrap rate by 2% in facilities of similar scale, the three most critical intervention points are: (1) Process parameter optimization — especially mold temperature tolerances. (2) Operator error analysis — per-shift calibration procedure. (3) Material acceptance criteria — incoming quality control thresholds.

cases.problem: Machine hour costs were miscalculated in quotes. Margins were eaten on every work order.
Raw material waste rate was invisible. The magnitude of annual loss was unknown.
Downtime and speed loss were tracked separately. Total OEE impact wasn't visible in currency.
